## ADR-043 Agent PR Review Checklist

Required for every PR generated by an AI lane (Codex, Claude Code, Kai, XO). Reference: [ADR-043 — Agent PR Review Checklist](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Ha0tvyHTaIpjBtBn4rTLveu0m3sLf5Oh/view).

- [ ] **1. CI not weakened** — no skipped tests, no muted assertions, no replaced or loosened guards
- [ ] **2. No duplicate utilities** — searched existing helpers before introducing parallel code
- [ ] **3. Security boundaries intact** — auth/role gates not removed or relaxed; `lib/permissions.ts` pattern not bypassed
- [ ] **4. Protect list honored** — pre-edit component inventory matches post-edit surface; sections listed for protection in the dispatch prompt remain intact
- [ ] **5. Repo-binding correct** — PR head + base branches in expected repo; CC session repo verified at dispatch (`REPO: TipsyDownrange/<repo-name>` as first GIT GATE field)
- [ ] **6. Test coverage** — net-new code includes targeted tests; full suite delta = +N passing, 0 net-new failures (pre-existing known failures excluded with citation)
- [ ] **7. Live evidence per Rule 12** — SHA + file:line + verification source (test run output, deployment URL, screenshot, or log excerpt)

A failed checklist item means REQUEST CHANGES, not merge with reservations.

## DONE REPORT

```text
DONE REPORT

1. Branch / PR:
2. Commit SHA:
3. Files changed:
4. File:line evidence:
5. Tests/checks run:
6. Deployment/preview:
7. Verification evidence:
8. Known limitations:
9. Follow-up drift created or closed:
```
